capabilities.description: The worker and its independent review pool can actually hear a hash-bound audio sample and return blind voice-distance scores under docs/TRANSFORM-RUBRIC.md.

profiles.label: Text and image review; audio unavailable
profiles.note: Use for runtimes that can research sources and inspect images but cannot hear audio. Audio-required tasks remain queued and visible; they are skipped, not rejected or blocked.

profiles.label: Text, image, and blind audio review
profiles.note: Activate only through reviewed policy after at least three genuinely audio-capable independent blind reviewers are available. The profile name is not proof that a runtime can hear.

rules.reason: A task with a voice-performance mode may require the voice-concealment axis. The reviewed text-vision pool cannot file that transform value without three actual blind listening scores, so the task must wait for an audio-capable profile.

task_overrides.reason: Sargon is a disembodied James Doohan voice performance. The current physical-prosthetic census hint is not authoritative for modality, so this exact source-bound task requires the audio-listening capability.

evidence.value: https://memory-alpha.fandom.com/wiki/Return_to_Tomorrow_(episode) — James Doohan was the voice of Sargon
